Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. TruffleRuby 70 upvotes, 3 comments
  2. From 300KB to 69KB per Token: How LLM Architectures Solve the KV Cache Problem 96 upvotes, 7 comments
  3. TinyLoRA – Learning to Reason in 13 Parameters 104 upvotes, 11 comments
  4. Learn Something Old Every Day, Part XVIII: How Does FPU Detection Work? 32 upvotes, 2 comments
  5. OkCupid gave 3M dating-app photos to facial recognition firm, FTC says 415 upvotes, 83 comments
  6. Neanderthals survived on a knife's edge for 350k years 35 upvotes, 3 comments
  7. Ministack (Replacement for LocalStack) 162 upvotes, 31 comments
  8. GitHub's Historic Uptime 431 upvotes, 106 comments
  9. 4D Doom 151 upvotes, 34 comments
  10. Back to FreeBSD – Part 2 – Jails 61 upvotes, 11 comments
  11. Show HN: Forkrun – NUMA-aware shell parallelizer (50×–400× faster than parallel) 124 upvotes, 30 comments
  12. Teenage Engineering's PO-32 acoustic modem and synth implementation 92 upvotes, 22 comments
  13. We intercepted the White House app's traffic. 77% of requests go to 3rd parties 149 upvotes, 43 comments
  14. Ordinary Lab Gloves May Have Skewed Microplastic Data 76 upvotes, 19 comments
  15. Open source CAD in the browser (Solvespace) 301 upvotes, 99 comments
  16. Cohere Transcribe: Speech Recognition 170 upvotes, 54 comments
  17. A dot a day keeps the clutter away 197 upvotes, 65 comments
  18. Axios compromised on NPM – Malicious versions drop remote access trojan 1793 upvotes, 729 comments
  19. Show HN: Postgres extension for BM25 relevance-ranked full-text search 112 upvotes, 34 comments
  20. The Claude Code Source Leak: fake tools, frustration regexes, undercover mode 929 upvotes, 369 comments
  21. Inside the 'self-driving' lab revolution 17 upvotes, 2 comments
  22. U.S. exempts oil industry from protecting Gulf animals, for 'national security' 189 upvotes, 71 comments
  23. Show HN: 1-Bit Bonsai, the First Commercially Viable 1-Bit LLMs 149 upvotes, 64 comments
  24. My son pleasured himself on Gemini Live. Entire family's Google accounts banned 126 upvotes, 53 comments
  25. I Traced My Traffic Through a Home Tailscale Exit Node 91 upvotes, 41 comments
  26. Why Don't You Use String Views Instead of Passing Std:Wstring by Const& 18 upvotes, 5 comments
  27. OpenAI closes funding round at an $852B valuation 371 upvotes, 315 comments
  28. Analyzing Geekbench 6 under Intel's BOT 3 upvotes, 0 comments
  29. Slop is not necessarily the future 193 upvotes, 344 comments
  30. Why the US Navy won't blast the Iranians and 'open' Strait of Hormuz 218 upvotes, 558 comments

Last generated 12:00pm, 1 April 2026. Source here.
